## Description

**TRY THE SPRAY VERSION OF BEAN: EASY TO USE, CONVENIENT TO KEEP IN YOUR CAR AND READY TO USE IN ANY SITUATION.**

Bean spray is the perfect solution to freshen the car up quickly and lend a pleasant fragrance to the textiles.
